completion_integrity.guard.notes: Must detect PLACEHOLDER, missing artifacts, failed commands, absent remote commits

deployment.verify.notes: Deployment verified claim requires deployment evidence file; local-only evidence insufficient

sanitization.complete.notes: Sanitization completed claim requires matching evidence artifact

backup.restore.notes: Backup restorable claim requires restoration test evidence

tests.unit.notes: Unit tests passed allowed only with local/tested scope (tests/ or local/ evidence)

production.operational.notes: Production operational claim requires prod evidence; local-only blocks
